transcript.text: If you can spot why this video flopped in the next 5 seconds, you're already in the top 10% of YouTubers. So, here's a title and here's a thumbnail. It got 4,000 impressions, but only 11 clicks. Look closely, the mistake is right there. Clue number one, the text in the title and the thumbnail say exactly the same thing. It's wasted space. Clue two, the face has no emotion whatsoever. There's no curiosity gap. And three, at thumbnail size, you can't even read that text. If you caught all three, well done, you think like a strategist. If you didn't, that's okay, that's normal. Most creators can't grade their own package. And that's the part that VidIQ does for you. It grades your thumbnail and your title before you even publish. So, you can fix a flop while it's still fixable. So, come on now, be honest, how many of the three did you actually get?
